title: Sleep-EDF Expanded: Whole-Night PSG Recordings
description: Sleep-EDF Expanded is a comprehensive polysomnographic dataset comprising 197 whole-night recordings from healthy subjects and drug study participants. The dataset includes EEG, EOG, EMG, and respiratory signals sampled at 100 Hz, with expert-annotated sleep stages assigned to 30-second epochs according to AASM criteria. This resource serves as a benchmark for sleep stage classification, sleep physiology research, and algorithm development in automated sleep analysis.
methods_description: Polysomnographic recordings were collected from two studies: a cassette study with 78 healthy subjects undergoing ambulatory 48-hour recordings, and a telemetry study with 22 subjects in a Temazepam drug study. Recorded signals include EEG (Fpz-Cz and Pz-Oz at 100 Hz), horizontal EOG, submental EMG, and in some recordings, respiration and temperature. Sleep stages were manually annotated by experts in 30-second epochs using AASM criteria (Wake, N1, N2, N3, REM, Unknown), with original Rechtschaffen & Kales stages preserved.
